title: Rotten Tomatoes: Movies | TV Shows | Movie Trailers | Reviews | Rotten Tomatoes
meta_description: Rotten Tomatoes, home of the Tomatometer, is the most trusted measurement of quality for Movies & TV. The definitive site for Reviews, Trailers, Showtimes, and Tickets
text_content: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come First Reviews Samara Weaving is fantastic in bloody, outrageous sequel. New Trailer: Spider-Man: Brand New Day What's in store for Peter Parker? Watch the Dune: Part Three Trailer Here's everything we know about the upcoming film Will Packer is Bringing the Rom-Com Back to Theaters with You, Me, & Tuscany Tickets for the producer's newest film are now on sale. 2026 Academy Awards: Full List of Winners Sinners , One Battle After Another win big Biggest Moments from the Oscars From historic wins to a rare tie and more Get to Know the Oscar Best Picture Nominees Ready for a taste of the year’s top films?
